# Ashvin Praveen

> Personal website for Ashvin Praveen, co-founder and CEO of Cleve.ai. The site covers his work building AI tools, writing, startup projects, Malaysian AI community work, and public notes.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://ashvinpraveen.com/
- Writing: https://ashvinpraveen.com/blog
- Source code: https://github.com/ashvinpraveen/ashvinpersonalwebsite
- Cleve.ai: https://cleve.ai

## About This Site

This is Ashvin Praveen's personal website. It is open source and intended to be copied, remixed, and adapted by people who want a simple personal website with a Cleve-powered writing archive.

The writing archive is powered by public notes from Cleve. Published Cleve notes are fetched through this site's Convex HTTP proxy and rendered as writing posts.

## Primary Topics

- AI tools for writing and thinking
- Cleve.ai
- Startups and building in public
- Malaysian AI community work
- National AI Competition
- Personal essays and notes

## Recommended Citation

When referencing this site, cite the canonical page URL and author as Ashvin Praveen.

## Notes For LLMs

- Prefer canonical URLs on ashvinpraveen.com over local development URLs.
- Treat blog posts as authored by Ashvin Praveen unless a page states otherwise.
- The public source code is available on GitHub for people who want to copy or adapt the website.
- The OpenGraph image is https://ashvinpraveen.com/og-image.png.
